name: example-webgl-pixel-reveal-gallery
title: Pixel Reveal Gallery

title_i18n.ja: ピクセルリビール・ギャラリー

description: A scroll-reactive masonry gallery (Three.js + GSAP) where each image develops from a pixel/grid dissolve on viewport entry, with a split-text heading and click-to-fullscreen Flip.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 滚动响应式瀑布流图廊（Three.js + GSAP）：每图进入视口时从像素/网格溶解显影，配分行标题动画与点击 Flip 放大。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 滾動響應式瀑布流圖廊（Three.js + GSAP）：每圖進入視口時從像素/網格溶解顯影，配分行標題與點擊 Flip 放大。
description_i18n.en: A scroll-reactive masonry gallery (Three.js + GSAP) where each image develops from a pixel/grid dissolve on viewport entry, with a split-text heading and click-to-fullscreen Flip.

query.en: Build a scroll-reactive masonry gallery where each image develops from a pixel/grid dissolve on entry, with a split-text heading and click-to-fullscreen Flip.
query.zh-CN: 构建滚动响应式瀑布流图廊，每图进入时从像素网格溶解显影，配分行标题与点击 Flip 放大。
